Product feedback management platform. Co: Product feedback management platform. Collect, organize, and prioritize feature requests from your users.
Your Canny secret API key. Find it at Se: Your Canny secret API key. Find it at Settings → API in your Canny admin dashboard.
Creates a new post on a Canny board.
Retrieves the details of an existing pos: Retrieves the details of an existing post by its ID.
Returns a list of posts for a board, wit: Returns a list of posts for a board, with optional filtering and sorting.
Casts a vote on a post on behalf of a us: Casts a vote on a post on behalf of a user.
Removes a vote from a post for a given u: Removes a vote from a post for a given user.

The unique identifier of the post author: The unique identifier of the post author (Canny user ID).
A brief title describing the post.
The longer description of the post.

The unique identifier of the category to: The unique identifier of the category to assign.
The unique identifier of the user respon: The unique identifier of the user responsible for completing the work.
The estimated delivery date in MM/YYYY f: The estimated delivery date in MM/YYYY format (e.g. "06/2026").
Whether the ETA should be visible to all: Whether the ETA should be visible to all users.
Custom fields as key-value pairs (keys m: Custom fields as key-value pairs (keys max 30 chars, values max 200 chars).
Original creation date in ISO 8601 forma: Original creation date in ISO 8601 format, for migrating posts from another source.
The unique identifier of the post.

A search query to filter posts.

Number of posts to skip (for pagination): Number of posts to skip (for pagination).
The unique identifier of the post to vot: The unique identifier of the post to vote on.
